total.description: Total number of items matching the filter parameter in the request.

cloudState.description: Cloud connectivity status of the system to which the resource belongs.

errCode.description: Error code of the blocked status of the system where the resource belongs

errMessage.description: Reason of the blocked status of the system where the resource belongs
errMessage.example: This storage system is not actively monitored in the cloud portal. Data Services Cloud Console proactively disabled monitoring and management of storage system with serial number {systemId} for sending excessive cloud events or for not responding to requests.

compression.description: Field to enable or disable compression for the bucket

notificationService.description: Enables or disables the bucket’s Notification Service.

httpStatusCode.description: The HTTP status code of the response

taskUri.description: Task URI which can be used to monitor the status of the operation.

bearer.description:
Storage Fleet API uses a JWT bearer token for authentication.
An authentication token can be obtained from the HPE GreenLake console.

info.description: HPE Greenlake For Object Storage REST APIs.
info.title: HPE Greenlake For Object Storage REST APIs.

get.description: Retrieves all access policies associated with the HPE Alletra Storage MP X10000 ObjectStore identified by {systemId}. The response can be filtered, sorted, and paginated using query parameters.

parameters.description:
A list of properties defining the sort order. This takes a single property name followed
by the direction to sort in, separated by a space.
The supported properties are `id`, `systemUid` and `generation`. If not specified,
the default behaviour is to sort by `generation`. The supported directions are
`asc` and `desc` for ascending and descending respectively.
parameters.name: sort

get.description: Retrieves a list of buckets associated with a specific HPE Alletra Storage MP X10000 ObjectStore. The results can be filtered, sorted, and paginated using query parameters to customize the response based on your requirements.

parameters.description:
A list of properties defining the sort order. This takes a single property name followed
by the direction to sort in, separated by a space.
The supported properties are `systemUid`, `id` and `generation`. If not specified,
the default behaviour is to sort by `generation`. The supported directions are
`asc` and `desc` for ascending and descending respectively.
parameters.name: sort

tags.description: The Access Policies API provides endpoints for creating, managing, and configuring access policies.
tags.name: access-policies

tags.description: The Buckets API provides endpoints for creating, managing, and configuring storage buckets.  Buckets are containers for organizing and storing data, and this API allows full control over their  lifecycle, including creation, updates, retrieval, and deletion.
tags.name: buckets

tags.description: The Groups API provides endpoints for creating, managing, and configuring groups.
tags.name: groups

tags.description: The Users API provides endpoints for creating, managing, and configuring users.
tags.name: users
